name: ai-assistant
description: AI-powered desktop workstation assistant with multi-model support

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered desktop assistant with multi-model support
interface.longDescription: A desktop AI workstation assistant built with Python and webview. Supports multiple AI models, chat sessions, PowerShell integration, and a configurable dark/light theme.
defaultPrompt: Help me analyze this code and suggest improvements.
Summarize my chat sessions and find key insights.
Run a PowerShell command to check system status.
